_doc: Durable queue of pending GPU work for the hourly fleet check (fleet-progress-aws.yml reports FREE SLOTS). On a free spot-Training slot the hourly check dispatches the highest-priority item with auto_launch=true whose preconditions are met, marks it in_flight, and commits this file. Items with auto_launch=false are EXPENSIVE/multi-leg (autonomy threshold) and are surfaced to the user for sign-off, never auto-launched. Keep this file current as work is launched/finished/approved.

items.desc: NR4A2 λ-repair ABFE replicate 2 (complex leg) — PAUSED ~18% for validate-first (prove the dense-16-window schedule restores soft-core-tail MBAR overlap on r1 BEFORE spending on the error-bar replicates)
items.workflow: gpu-abfe-aws.yml (or the nr4a2rep submitter) — re-dispatch with the SAME checkpoint prefix nr4a3-abfe-nr4a2rep-r2 to resume from checkpoint
preconditions: r1 reaches the repaired tail windows (~9-15)
then resume for the error bar
items.note: Stopped 2026-07-10 ~6:05 PM ET. Checkpoint preserved in S3 (resumes from ~18%, loses <=1 window). Do NOT auto-resume — gated on the r1 overlap check. If overlap does NOT recover, do NOT resume; the dense schedule needs redesign (more iters/window or different soft-core), not more replicates.

items.desc: NR4A2 λ-repair ABFE replicate 3 (complex leg) — PAUSED ~17% for validate-first (same gate as r2)
items.workflow: gpu-abfe-aws.yml (or the nr4a2rep submitter) — re-dispatch with the SAME checkpoint prefix nr4a3-abfe-nr4a2rep-r3 to resume from checkpoint
preconditions: r1 reaches the repaired tail windows (~9-15)
then resume for the error bar
items.note: Stopped 2026-07-10 ~6:05 PM ET. Checkpoint preserved. Gated on the r1 overlap check — same as nr4a2rep-r2-resume.

items.desc: Phase 2 single-shard shakeout — metad on the data-derived TICA CV, NR4A3 seed 1, 8 ns
items.note: Re-dispatched 2026-07-10 7:02 PM ET after the DCD-append resume fix (prior run 29116679264 crashed on FileNotFoundError for the .dcd on resume; science was intact — gate passed, MD ran ~6.6/8ns). Do NOT re-dispatch (would duplicate). Its gate/recrossing result is the go/no-go for phase2-fleet.

items.desc: Full Phase 2 opening-FE fleet — 8 runs: NR4A3 seeds 2,3 + NR4A1 r1/2/3 + NR4A2 r1/2/3, ~50 ns each, tica_combine CV, to get the paralogue-differential opening free energy
items.workflow: metad-tica-shakeout-aws.yml (per run; TARGET/SEED vary — a fleet submitter can be added when approved)
preconditions: shakeout CV drove recrossing (closed<->open recrossing in the shakeout COLVAR)
items.note: USER PRE-APPROVED 2026-07-10 (~7:05 PM ET): 'let's plan on doing it assuming the first leg comes back looking how we want it.' The ~$100-200 spend is authorized CONTINGENT on the shakeout returning clean recrossing. Sequence: shakeout completes -> read its COLVAR -> if the TICA CV recrosses closed<->open, bring the recrossing evidence to the user and launch the 8-run fleet (no second sign-off needed for the spend; a heads-up with the evidence is the courtesy). If recrossing is poor, do NOT launch; report the diagnostic and redesign the CV. Still auto_launch=false because it must wait on the shakeout result, not a free slot.
